response.justification: While Bogdan is a highly experienced software engineer with a strong background in full-stack development, microservices, and AI-agent infrastructure, his resume lacks experience in the core domain of this Principal role. There is no evidence of building experimentation platforms, feature-flagging systems, telemetry foundations, or working with statistical methods for A/B testing, which are critical requirements for this IC6 position.
strengths: Over 15 years of software engineering experience across a diverse set of languages including JS/TS, C/C++, Java, and D.
Experience building high-throughput microservices handling millions of requests per second.
Recent experience contributing to AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling.
concerns: Complete lack of experience with experimentation systems, A/B testing, or feature-flagging infrastructure.
No demonstrated background in data analysis, statistical methods, or telemetry foundations.
Missing evidence of leading enterprise-scale platform architecture initiatives typical of a Principal (IC6) engineer.
